english: According to the Motor Vehicles Act in India, what is the maximum allowed blood alcohol content for a driver?
hindi: भारत में मोटर वाहन अधिनियम के अनुसार, ड्राइवर के लिए अनुमतmaximum रक्त अल्कोहल सामग्री क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் மோட்டார் வாகன சட்டப்படி, ஒரு ஓட்டுநருக்கு அனுமதிக்கப்படும் உயர் அளவு இரத்த ஆல்கஹால் கலவை என்ன?
vietnamese: Theo Đạo luật Phương tiện Cơ giới ở Ấn Độ, hàm lượng cồn trong máu tối đa được phép cho một tài xế là gì?
correct_answer: The maximum allowed blood alcohol content for a driver in India is 0.03% or 30 mg per 100 ml of blood. This is as per the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing a incorrect percentage or refusing to answer due to lack of specific knowledge about Indian road safety rules.
